description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ptf-ebpf that runs on push to main, pull requests to main, and merge groups to main. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs for the same pull request or reference, except for the main branch. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with specific environment variables, checking out submodules, using ccache with a 1000M max size, building with a script, and running PTF tests for the eBPF backend.
